title: Quantum Data Stream
description: An experimental visualization of real-time quantum fluctuations in a simulated environment. This project explores the intersection of particle physics and generative art.

title: Neural Network Topography
description: Mapping the hidden layers of a deep learning model into a 3D landscape. Each peak represents a high-activation neuron, creating a digital mountain range of thought.

title: The Global Pulse
description: A comprehensive information design project visualizing global trade routes and their environmental impact over the last decade. Focused on clarity and narrative flow.

title: Urban Metabolism
description: Visualizing the energy and resource consumption of a smart city. This interactive dashboard helps urban planners identify inefficiencies in real-time.

title: Cybernetic Organism
description: A series of digital sculptures exploring the fusion of biological forms with mechanical structures. Rendered with custom shaders for a unique retro-cyber feel.

title: Void Echoes
description: An immersive audio-visual experience that translates sound waves into geometric patterns. The visuals react dynamically to the frequency and amplitude of the input.
